steps.title: Read the table total
steps.content: The table has $100$ tiles total. The red-tile total is $30$.

steps.title: Use favorable over total
steps.content: The probability of selecting a red tile is $$\frac{\text{red tiles}}{\text{total tiles}}=\frac{30}{100}=\frac{3}{10}=0.3$$

steps.title: Confirm the grid-in answer
steps.content: The free-response box can accept $0.3$, $.3$, or $\frac{3}{10}$. Since the stored correct answer is $0.3$, enter $0.3$.
